节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The context of auto fill extension. It allows access to AutoFillExtension-specific resources.
Reload autoFillExtension in modal window. needs to be raised again, pass this parameter to the application framework.
注释信息: @param { CustomData } customData - User defined data. When the modal window of AutoFillExtension
@returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Not System App. Interface caller is not a system app.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - If the input parameter is not valid parameter.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000011 - The context does not exist.

parameters.说明: User defined data. When the modal window of AutoFillExtension

节点.return_description: The promise returned by the function.
